title: Vacancy in office because of retirement
doc_html:
§1356.  Vacancy in office because of retirement

The retirement of a judge creates a vacancy in the office which shall be filled in the manner provided by law.  

Redesignated from R.S. 13:30(F) by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.
doc_text:
§1356.  Vacancy in office because of retirement
The retirement of a judge creates a vacancy in the office which shall be filled in the manner provided by law.
Redesignated from R.S. 13:30(F) by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.
